calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kenneth Ahn for Jin Kim.

The Court stated that many things have been done without court approval, that it is a grave concern to the court and that there is an attitude of not needing to follow the rules. Mr. Ahn reported that this was his first time to probate an estate with full authority, that he is sorry for the mistakes, that they were not intentional, that they were his mistakes and not the executor's, that he worked hard and his fees should not be affected and that they pray for the court's leniency. The Court stated that the accounting is the responsibility of the executor and not the attorney and that if the fees are approved they will need to be taken from the executor. Mr. Ahn stated that he sent an email to the probate examiner regarding this yesterday, that the executor is in agreement of the attorney receiving the fees, that the executor gave him discretion to decide and clarified that the document was not filed. The Court stated that if there is something you want the court to consider it must be filed, not emailed and asked if it was signed by the executor. Mr. Ahn stated that he can file the document and read the email to the court. The Court stated that the accounting petition will be under submission pending and upon receipt of the filed supplement which is to be signed and verified by the executor, that it should be submitted no later than March 29, 2016, that the court will consider the fees requested by the attorney and reductions if any to fees of the executor and any reductions due to the actions taken without court approval. Mr. Ahn is to submit a proposed order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos & Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-28-2015 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-30-2015 Continued To Oct-28-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that this is a troubled case and that it is not clear why they have not filed the petition for final distribution. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Jin Kim and the Attorney H. Kenneth Ahn to appear on October 28, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the corrected inventory & appraisal and the petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputies Watts & Siu. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-02-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: H. Kenneth Ahn for Jin Kim.

The Court stated that it needs an Inventory & Appraisal as of the date of death. Mr. Ahn stated that he filed one in May. The Court reiterated that it had to be as of the date of death. Mr. Ahn stated that he will file one by next Wednesday, that he will contact the referee and asked if he still needed a referee as the property has been sold. The Court confirmed that a referee was necessary as the Inventory & Appraisal has to be as of the date of death and that it will also need a petition for final distribution filed. The accounting status report was continued to September 30, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court expects a petition for final distribution to be on file by this date and if not a proper report on status which is verified and noticed will need to be on file.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

Off Calendar May-13-2015 Continued To Jun-10-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Jin Kim and the Attorney H. Kenneth Ahn to appear on June 10, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Petition for Final Distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputies Lopes & Santiago. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing The Inventory And Appraisal And For Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Apr-01-2015 Continued To May-13-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Hyunson Ahn for Jin Kim.

The court noted that an Inventory & Appraisal had been filed this morning and asked about the petition for final distribution. Mr. Ahn stated that he needs a one-month continuance to get the petition filed. The status on filing a petition to close the estate was continued to May 13, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
